_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. App fetches this on launch to know latest version. Bump version + summary when ToS/Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v2.2.2：採 LINE 模式單一級「離開 Folio」+ 共讀便利貼牆機制
terms.summary_en: v2.2.2: Single-tier 'Leave Folio' (LINE pattern) + co-reading sticky notes wall

privacy.summary_zh: v2.2.3：同意紀錄改 5 年保留（salted SHA-256 email hash）+ Sign in with Apple 撤銷說明
privacy.summary_en: v2.2.3: 5-year consent retention (salted SHA-256 email hash) + Sign in with Apple revocation clause
